env_vars.name: GONOSUMDB
env_vars.desc: 跳过 sum 校验模块列表

post_install.config_template:
[mysqld]
port=3306
basedir={basedir}
datadir={datadir}
max_connections=200
character-set-server=utf8mb4
default-storage-engine=INNODB
default_authentication_plugin=mysql_native_password

[mysql]
default-character-set=utf8mb4

[client]
port=3306
default-character-set=utf8mb4

env_vars.name: ANDROID_SDK_ROOT
env_vars.desc: Android SDK 根目录（旧版本）
